'''zhatacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:svl|svl]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-t-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:svl|svl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhatacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhætæchæth|zhætæchæth]] || [[word:zhætæchæj|zhætæchæj]] || [[word:zhætæchæsh|zhætæchæsh]] || [[word:zhætæchæ|zhætæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhatatachath|zhatatachath]] || [[word:zhatatachaj|zhatatachaj]] || [[word:zhatatachash|zhatatachash]] || [[word:zhatatacha|zhatatacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhatachath|zhatachath]] || [[word:zhatachaj|zhatachaj]] || [[word:zhatachash|zhatachash]] || [[word:zhatacha|zhatacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhatafchath|zhatafchath]] || [[word:zhatafchaj|zhatafchaj]] || [[word:zhatafchash|zhatafchash]] || [[word:zhatafchaf|zhatafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhatachatha|zhatachatha]] || [[word:zhatachaja|zhatachaja]] || [[word:zhatachasha|zhatachasha]] || [[word:zhatachaka|zhatachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhatachath|zhatachath]] || [[word:zhatachaj|zhatachaj]] || [[word:zhatachash|zhatachash]] || [[word:zhatacha|zhatacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhatachathal|zhatachathal]] || [[word:zhatachajal|zhatachajal]] || [[word:zhatachashal|zhatachashal]] || [[word:zhatachakal|zhatachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhatachathatha|zhatachathatha]] || [[word:zhatachajaja|zhatachajaja]] || [[word:zhatachashasha|zhatachashasha]] || [[word:zhatachaka|zhatachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhatachathan|zhatachathan]] || [[word:zhatachajan|zhatachajan]] || [[word:zhatachashan|zhatachashan]] || [[word:zhatachakan|zhatachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhatachathaoro|zhatachathaoro]] || [[word:zhatachajaoro|zhatachajaoro]] || [[word:zhatachashaoro|zhatachashaoro]] || [[word:zhatachakaoro|zhatachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
